productDisplayName: Puma Men Aquil White Sports Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These Sports  shoes are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperMesh upper with synthetic and suede overlaysSynthetic twill tape laces in dual tonesOutsole reinforced onto the toe to act as a toe guardFormstripe on the sideComfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitTextile lining for added comfortMidsoleLightweight midsoleOutsoleMade of high traction rubber and has a scooped midfootMultidirectional lugs, suction points and flex grooves on the outsoleshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
